name: Aaron's Jewelry and Loan, Inc.
description_short: Aaron's Jewelry and Loan is a Metro Detroit pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and merchandise buying services for jewelry, electronics, tools, and other items of value.
description_long:
Aaron's Jewelry and Loan has operated in the Metro Detroit area for over 20 years, establishing itself as a local pawn and collateral loan provider. The business is located at 12345 Woodward Ave in Highland Park, Michigan, positioned between Cortland and Highland avenues, six blocks south of Davison Highway. The company emphasizes accessibility and speed, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional bank lending for consumers who need fast cash.

The company offers two primary services: collateral-based pawn loans with a three-month term and merchandise purchasing. Their pawn loan process allows customers to bring items of value, receive a cash offer from an associate, and store their merchandise securely until the loan balance is repaid. Customers can repay and reclaim their items at any point within the three-month period or extend the loan multiple times. The company also actively buys merchandise outright across a wide range of categories, including jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, sporting goods, and household items.

Aaron's distinguishes itself through breadth of inventory acceptance and competitive pricing claims. The website emphasizes that they pay "higher prices" than competitors and offer "the best deals in the city" on brand-name merchandise. They accept nearly any item of value, from fine jewelry and watches to large appliances, computers, gaming systems, lawn equipment, and furs. This broad acceptance reduces friction for customers seeking quick liquidity on diverse personal property.

The business operates as a straightforward pawn operation with no claims of credit repair, financial counseling, or alternative lending structures. The three-month loan term is fixed, and while extension is permitted, no pricing or terms for extensions are disclosed on the website. The company provides collateral-based liquidity for consumers with items of value but no formal underwriting or credit-based lending product.
pros: Established 20+ year track record in Metro Detroit market with stated reputation focus
Accepts extremely broad range of collateral including jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, sporting goods, appliances, and furs
Three-month pawn loan term with flexible repayment—customers can repay and reclaim merchandise at any time within the period
Unlimited loan extensions available, allowing customers to retain collateral indefinitely by extending
Claims to pay higher prices and offer competitive rates compared to other city pawn shops
Secure merchandise storage provided during loan period
No credit check or formal underwriting required for pawn loans
cons: No pricing, interest rates, or fee structures disclosed on website—customers must visit in person for quotes
Loan extension terms, fees, and conditions not explained; no information on what happens if loans are not repaid or extended
Limited online presence and dated website design reduce accessibility for remote inquiry
No transparent redemption or forfeiture process outlined; unclear what happens to unclaimed merchandise
No mention of licensing, bonding, or compliance with Michigan pawn shop regulations on website
best_for: Consumers with jewelry, electronics, or tools needing immediate cash without credit checks
Individuals seeking to sell brand-name merchandise quickly at competitive local prices
People with valuable items looking for short-term collateral loans with flexible repayment windows
diagnosis: Aaron's Jewelry and Loan is best suited for Metro Detroit consumers who own valuable personal property and need rapid, no-credit-check liquidity. The main caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing and fee disclosure online—all loan terms, interest rates, and extension fees must be negotiated in-person, and the forfeiture/redemption process is not clearly explained.
services: Three-month collateral pawn loans on items of value
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (all styles: rings, watches, bracelets, earrings, pendants, necklaces)
Sterling silver buying (trays, forks, spoons, etc.)
Electronics buying (televisions, DVD players, stereos, digital cameras, camcorders)
Video game system and software buying (PlayStation 3, Xbox 360, Nintendo Wii, Nintendo DS, PSP)
Musical instrument and recording gear buying (guitars, amplifiers, keyboards, drums, saxophones)
Tools buying (cordless drills, saws, compressors, generators, welding equipment)
Computer and peripheral buying (laptops, desktops, printers, scanners, fax machines)
Sporting goods buying (golf clubs, fishing equipment, camping gear, binoculars)
Lawn equipment buying (mowers, weed eaters, tillers, leaf blowers)
Appliance buying (microwaves, refrigerators) and miscellaneous merchandise buying
meta_description: Aaron's Jewelry and Loan is a Metro Detroit pawn shop offering collateral-based loans and buying services for jewelry, electronics, and tools.
